name: ruby-mini-exiftool
title: ruby-mini-exiftool
description:
wrapper for exiftool command-line
This library is a wrapper for the Exiftool command-line application,
written by Phil Harvey. It provides the full power of Exiftool to Ruby:
reading and writing of EXIF-data, IPTC-data and XMP-data.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use ruby-mini-exiftool because wrapper for exiftool command-line.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use ruby-mini-exiftool as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair ruby-mini-exiftool with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `ruby-mini-exiftool --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
